arabic_text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَظْلِمُ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ وَإِن تَكُ حَسَنَةً يُضَعِفْهَا وَيُؤْتِ مِن لَّدُنْهُ أَجْرًا عَظِيمًا
alt_text: Arabic verse: 'Indeed, Allah does not do injustice [even] as much as an atom's weight; and if there is a good deed, He multiplies it and gives from Himself a great reward.' Sura al-Nisa 4:40.
notes: Inline Quran verse image (no HTML widget). Surah 4 (al-Nisa), ayat 40.
